tuning: D A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Simple and easy to play on acoustic guitar. Have fun and play with variations of the chords once you're comfortable.

content:
Capo 3
Drop D tuning
Alternating bass fingerpicking.


[Intro]
| [ch]D[/ch]  | [ch]D[/ch]  | [ch]D[/ch]  | [ch]D[/ch]  |
| [ch]D[/ch]  | [ch]A[/ch]  | [ch]G[/ch]  | [ch]D[/ch]  |
| [ch]D[/ch]  | [ch]A[/ch]  | [ch]D[/ch]  | [ch]D[/ch]  | [ch]D[/ch]  | [ch]D[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
I know they say you can't go home again[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
  I just had to come back one last time[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Ma'am, I know you don't know me from Adam[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]A[/ch]
But these handprints on the front steps are mine[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
Up those stairs in that little back bedroom[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F#m[/ch]
Is where I did my homework and I learned to play guitar[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
Now I bet you didn't know under that live oak[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]                             [ch]A[/ch]
My favorite dog is buried in the yard[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                                      [ch]D[/ch]
I thought if I could touch this place or feel it[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]
This brokenness inside me might start healing[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
Out here it's like I'm someone else[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]
I thought that maybe I could find myself[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
If I could just come in I swear I'll leave[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
Won't take nothing but a memory from the house that built me[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
Mama cut out pictures of houses for years[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#m[/ch]
From "Better Homes and Garden" magazine[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
Plans were drawn and concrete poured, nail by nail and board by board[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]A[/ch]
  Daddy gave life to mama's dream[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                                      [ch]D[/ch]
I thought if I could touch this place or feel it[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]
This brokenness inside me might start healing[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
Out here it's like I'm someone else[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]
I thought that maybe I could find myself[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
If I could just come in I swear I'll leave[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
Won't take nothing but a memory from the house that built me[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]
You leave home, you move on and you do the best you can[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                    [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
I got lost in this whole world and forgot who I am[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                                      [ch]D[/ch]
I thought if I could touch this place or feel it[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]
This brokenness inside me might start healing[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
Out here it's like I'm someone else[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]
I thought that maybe I could find myself[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]G[/ch]
If I could walk around I swear I'll leave[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Won't take nothing but a memory from the house that built me[/tab]


[Outro]
| [ch]D[/ch]  | [ch]D[/ch]  | [ch]Em[/ch]  | [ch]A[/ch]  | [ch]D[/ch]
